unit: Unit 8: Apps and the App Store
title: Permissions and Privacy
drDigitalIntro: When you install an app, it might ask for permissions to access your camera, microphone, location, or files. Allow only what makes sense — a photo editor needs access to Photos, but a game probably shouldn't need your location. You can change permissions later in System Settings. Check permissions for apps you don't trust. This protects your privacy and security.
drDigitalSuccess: You can control what information apps can see!
drDigitalHint: Only grant permissions that make sense for the app.
